SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.caztor.base

Interface FeedHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultFeedHandler
public interface FeedHandler
The interface that defines a feed handler. A FeedHandler takes care of basic feed management, but also of aggregation of multiple feeds.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addFeed(String displayName, URL uri)
    addFeed() returns true if a new feed is added.
    void
    addFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)
    The listener will receive update about the status of feed aggregation, as the aggregator runs.
    void
    cancelUpdate()
    Cancel any ongoing update, which may mean killing a thread.
    void
    editFeeds()
    Bring up some kind of editor for the user to manage feeds.
    int
    getFeedCount()
    Get the total number of feeds in our list.
    GemLink
    getFeedLink(int index)
    Get the URI for a specific feed.
    boolean
    isInFeedList(URL uri)
    Returns true if the URI is definitely in the list, and false if not, or uncertain.
    boolean
    isRunning()
    Returns true if the feed aggregator is running.
    void
    removeFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)
     
    void
    showFeeds()
    Bring up some kind of list of all feeds for the user.
    void
    start()
    Start the feed aggregator (in the background).

  • Method Details

    • addFeedManagerStatusListener

      void addFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)
      The listener will receive update about the status of feed aggregation, as the aggregator runs.

    • cancelUpdate

      void cancelUpdate()
      Cancel any ongoing update, which may mean killing a thread.

    • isInFeedList

      boolean isInFeedList(URL uri)
      Returns true if the URI is definitely in the list, and false if not, or uncertain. This method throws no exceptions.

    • addFeed

      boolean addFeed(String displayName, URL uri) throws IOException
      addFeed() returns true if a new feed is added. The only reason not to add the feed -- other than exception -- is that the URI is already feeded.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • editFeeds

      void editFeeds() throws IOException
      Bring up some kind of editor for the user to manage feeds.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • getFeedCount

      int getFeedCount()
      Get the total number of feeds in our list.

    • getFeedLink

      GemLink getFeedLink(int index)
      Get the URI for a specific feed.

    • isRunning

      boolean isRunning()
      Returns true if the feed aggregator is running.

    • removeFeedManagerStatusListener

      void removeFeedManagerStatusListener(FeedManagerStatusListener l)

    • start

      void start()
      Start the feed aggregator (in the background).

    • showFeeds

      void showFeeds() throws IOException
      Bring up some kind of list of all feeds for the user.
      Throws:
      IOException
